Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a service account

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is creating service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} changed service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is changing service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change service account {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
